300.prompt: Start with this detail: Futures thinking is partly analytical and partly imaginative. Which idea gives the best comparison?
wrongAnswers: False imminence
Retrofuturism
AI as future symbol
300.visibleConnection: The question starts from a concrete detail in What futurism does: Futures thinking is partly analytical and partly imaginative. It is really asking which answer handles a similar pressure. Hype cycles is the best connection because it converts early promise into waves of inflated expectation, disappointment, and sometimes useful adoption. Both ideas ask alpacas to notice that Futurism gives uncertainty a plot. That plot can motivate, distract, sell, or console.
